function_v0.doc:
Burn (destroy) `amount` tokens from `from`.

Reduces `total_supply` accordingly.

Only the admin vault can burn shares. This keeps redemption, cooldown, fee,
and PnL accounting routed through the vault withdrawal path even when
optional share transfers are enabled.

# Arguments
* `from`   \xe2\x80\x93 Token holder whose tokens are destroyed (must sign).
* `amount` \xe2\x80\x93 Number of tokens to burn. Must be > 0.

# Auth
Admin must authorize.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]      if `amount < 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`]           if `amount == 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::InsufficientBalance`] if `from` holds fewer tokens.
* [`ShareTokenError::Overflow`]            on arithmetic underflow.
function_v0.name: burn

function_v0.doc:
Mint `amount` new tokens and credit them to `to`.

Only the admin (vault contract) may call this function.
Increases `total_supply` accordingly.

# Arguments
* `to`     \xe2\x80\x93 Recipient of the newly created tokens.
* `amount` \xe2\x80\x93 Number of tokens to mint. Must be > 0.

# Auth
The stored admin address must authorize this call.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`]  if the contract has not been set up.
* [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]  if `amount < 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`]       if `amount == 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::Overflow`]        on arithmetic overflow.
function_v0.name: mint

function_v0.doc:
Return the token name.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`] if the contract has not been initialized.
function_v0.name: name

function_v0.doc:
Return the token symbol.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`] if the contract has not been initialized.
function_v0.name: symbol

function_v0.doc:
Approve `spender` to transfer up to `amount` tokens on behalf of the
caller (`from`).

Setting `amount` to `0` effectively revokes the allowance.

**Zero-first rule:** To prevent the well-known allowance race condition,
changing a live non-zero allowance directly to another non-zero value is
rejected.  Callers must first set the allowance to `0`, then set the new
value \xe2\x80\x94 or use [`increase_allowance`] / [`decrease_allowance`] for atomic
adjustments.

# Arguments
* `from`              \xe2\x80\x93 Token holder (must sign this transaction).
* `spender`           \xe2\x80\x93 Address being authorized.
* `amount`            \xe2\x80\x93 Maximum tokens the spender may move. Must be \xe2\x89\xa5 0.
* `expiration_ledger` \xe2\x80\x93 Last ledger where the allowance is valid
(inclusive). After this ledger, allowance reads
as zero and delegated spending reverts.

# Auth
`from` must authorize this call.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]  if `amount < 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::NonZeroAllowance`] if a live non-zero allowance
already exists and `amount
function_v0.name: approve

function_v0.doc:
Return the token balance of `id`.

Returns `0` for addresses that have never received tokens.

# Arguments
* `id` \xe2\x80\x93 The address to query.
function_v0.name: balance

function_v0.doc:
Return the number of decimal places.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`] if the contract has not been initialized.
function_v0.name: decimals

function_v0.doc:
Transfer `amount` tokens from the caller to `to`.

# Arguments
* `from`   \xe2\x80\x93 Sender (must sign).
* `to`     \xe2\x80\x93 Recipient.
* `amount` \xe2\x80\x93 Number of tokens to send. Must be > 0.

# Auth
`from` must authorize this call.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]      if `amount < 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`]           if `amount == 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::InsufficientBalance`] if `from` has fewer tokens
than `amount`.
* [`ShareTokenError::Overflow`]            on arithmetic overflow (should
never happen with valid i128 balances).
function_v0.name: transfer

function_v0.doc:
Return the current spending allowance granted by `from` to `spender`.

Returns `0` if no allowance has been granted or if it has been revoked.

# Arguments
* `from`    \xe2\x80\x93 The token holder.
* `spender` \xe2\x80\x93 The approved spender.
function_v0.name: allowance

function_v0.doc:
Disabled delegated burn entrypoint.

Disabled for vault shares. Delegated out-of-vault burning can desynchronize
redemption, fee, PnL, and cooldown assumptions; shares should be redeemed
through the vault withdrawal path.

# Arguments
* `spender` \xe2\x80\x93 Authorized burner (must sign).
* `from`    \xe2\x80\x93 Token holder whose tokens are destroyed.
* `amount`  \xe2\x80\x93 Number of tokens to burn. Must be > 0.

# Auth
No delegated burn authorization is accepted.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]          if `amount < 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`]               if `amount == 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::TransfersDisabled`] always, after amount validation.
function_v0.name: burn_from

function_v0.doc:
Return the current admin address.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`] if the contract has not been initialized.
function_v0.name: get_admin

function_v0.doc:
Transfer admin rights to `new_admin`.

After this call, only `new_admin` can mint tokens and call `set_admin`
again. The old admin loses all privileged access.

# Arguments
* `new_admin` \xe2\x80\x93 The address that will become the new admin.

# Auth
The current admin must authorize this call.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`] if the contract has not been set up.
function_v0.name: set_admin

function_v0.doc:
Return the current total supply of outstanding tokens.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NotInitialized`] if the contract has not been initialized.
function_v0.name: total_supply

function_v0.doc:
Transfer `amount` tokens from `from` to `to` using a pre-approved
allowance.

The spender's allowance is decremented by `amount`.

# Arguments
* `spender` \xe2\x80\x93 Account authorized to move tokens (must sign).
* `from`    \xe2\x80\x93 Token holder whose balance is debited.
* `to`      \xe2\x80\x93 Recipient.
* `amount`  \xe2\x80\x93 Number of tokens to send. Must be > 0.

# Auth
`spender` must authorize this call.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]          if `amount < 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`]               if `amount == 0`.
* [`ShareTokenError::InsufficientAllowance`]   if allowance < amount.
* [`ShareTokenError::InsufficientBalance`]     if `from` balance < amount.
* [`ShareTokenError::Overflow`]                on arithmetic overflow.
function_v0.name: transfer_from

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the ShareToken contract.

Runs atomically at `CreateContract` time, preventing front-running
attacks where an attacker could otherwise call `initialize` first and
claim the admin role.

# Arguments
* `admin`    \xe2\x80\x93 The vault contract address that will be allowed to mint
and burn tokens (typically the deploying manager, later
transferred to the vault via `set_admin`).
* `name`     \xe2\x80\x93 Human-readable token name (e.g. `"Vault Share Token"`).
* `symbol`   \xe2\x80\x93 Short ticker symbol (e.g. `"VST"`).
* `decimals` \xe2\x80\x93 Number of decimal places (typically `7` to match Stellar
native asset precision).
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc: Return true when user share transfers are enabled.
function_v0.name: transfers_enabled

function_v0.doc:
Atomically decrease the allowance granted to `spender` by `delta`.

Safe alternative to `approve` for lowering an existing allowance without
the approval race condition.  If `delta` exceeds the current allowance
the allowance is set to `0` (floors, does not panic).

# Arguments
* `from`              \xe2\x80\x93 Token holder (must sign).
* `spender`           \xe2\x80\x93 Approved spender.
* `delta`             \xe2\x80\x93 Amount to subtract. Must be > 0.
* `expiration_ledger` \xe2\x80\x93 New expiry applied to the updated allowance.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`] / [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]
function_v0.name: decrease_allowance

function_v0.doc:
Atomically increase the allowance granted to `spender` by `delta`.

Safe alternative to `approve` for raising an existing allowance without
the approval race condition.

# Arguments
* `from`              \xe2\x80\x93 Token holder (must sign).
* `spender`           \xe2\x80\x93 Approved spender.
* `delta`             \xe2\x80\x93 Amount to add. Must be > 0.
* `expiration_ledger` \xe2\x80\x93 New expiry applied to the updated allowance.

# Errors
* [`ShareTokenError::ZeroAmount`]  / [`ShareTokenError::NegativeAmount`]
* [`ShareTokenError::Overflow`] if the resulting allowance exceeds i128::MAX.
function_v0.name: increase_allowance

function_v0.doc:
Enable or disable user share transfers. Admin only.

Vault deployments keep transfers disabled by default so cooldown and
per-user PnL accounting remain address-accurate. Enabling transfers is
an explicit vault/governance decision that makes those per-user controls
informational unless the vault implements transfer-aware accounting.
function_v0.name: set_transfers_enabled

udt_error_enum_v0.doc:
Errors that can be returned by the ShareToken contract.

Each variant maps to a unique u32 discriminant so that the Soroban host
can surface them as typed contract errors to callers.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: ShareTokenError

cases.doc: The contract has not yet been initialized via `initialize`.
cases.name: NotInitialized

cases.doc: `initialize` was called on a contract that is already initialized.
cases.name: AlreadyInitialized

cases.doc: The caller does not have the required authority (e.g. non-admin tried\nto mint).
cases.name: NotAuthorized

cases.doc: The source account does not hold enough tokens for the requested\ntransfer or burn.
cases.name: InsufficientBalance

cases.doc: The spender's allowance is smaller than the requested `transfer_from`\nor `burn_from` amount.
cases.name: InsufficientAllowance

cases.doc: A negative amount was supplied where only non-negative values are\naccepted.
cases.name: NegativeAmount

cases.doc: A zero amount was supplied where a strictly-positive value is required.
cases.name: ZeroAmount

cases.doc: An arithmetic operation would overflow i128.
cases.name: Overflow

cases.doc: `approve` was called with a non-zero amount while a non-zero, non-expired\nallowance already exists for that (owner, spender) pair.  Set the\nallowance to 0 first, or use `increase_allowance`/`decrease_allowance`.
cases.name: NonZeroAllowance

cases.doc: Share transfers are disabled for this vault share token.
cases.name: TransfersDisabled

void_v0.name: TotalSupply

void_v0.name: TransfersEnabled

tuple_v0.doc: Per-account token balance \xe2\x80\x94 stored in PERSISTENT storage.
tuple_v0.name: Balance

tuple_v0.name: Allowance

udt_struct_v0.doc: The map key used for per-account allowance entries.\nBoth fields are included so that (from, spender) pairs are unique.
udt_struct_v0.name: AllowanceKey

fields.doc: The token-holder who granted the allowance.

fields.doc: The account permitted to spend on behalf of `from`.

fields.doc: Last ledger sequence where this allowance is valid (inclusive).
